name: nRF52 Firmware Updates
description: The nRF52 platform supports firmware updates via Over-the-Air (OTA) mechanisms. The **only supported bootloader** for OTA updates is **MCUboot**.

config_entries.label: Transport
config_entries.description: Specifies the transport method used by Zephyr MCUmgr for OTA updates. By default, Bluetooth Low Energy (`ble: true`) is enabled.

config_entries.label: BLE
config_entries.description: Enable Bluetooth Low Energy transport for MCUmgr OTA. Default false.

config_entries.label: Hardware UART
config_entries.description: Select a hardware UART interface to use for MCUmgr OTA communication. This is used when updating devices over a serial interface rather than BLE. Options: CDC, CDC1, UART0, UART1.
